basic_details.job_title: BEL Graduate Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 - Walk-In Written Test for Engineering Graduates
basic_details.total_vacancies: Not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released.
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Bengaluru, has released a walk-in written test notification for Graduate Apprenticeship Training (GAPP) 2026-27. BEL, a Navaratna Public Sector Company under the Ministry of Defence, is engaging Engineering Graduates for a one-year Apprenticeship Training programme under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS), through the Board of Apprenticeship Training (BoAT), Southern Region, Chennai. The written test will be held on 6th, 7th and 8th August 2026 across 14 engineering disciplines.

application_fee.details: Not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released.

qualification.details: Candidates should possess Engineering/Technology Graduation from a recognized Board/University on or after 01-07-2022, in one of the 14 disciplines listed above. | Minimum percentage required in graduation:

salary_details.details: Monthly Stipend: ₹17,500/- (Rupees Seventeen Thousand & Five Hundred only), during the training period. Of this, ₹13,000/- will be paid by BEL and ₹4,500/- will be paid by the Government through Direct Beneficiary Transfer (DBT). | Additional facilities provided: | Canteen and Transport facilities available on chargeable basis. Free OPD Medical facilities at BEL hospital as per Company norms. Free Group Personnel Accident Insurance (GPAI) policy insured for a sum of ₹5.00 Lakhs.

selection_process: Selection is purely on the basis of merit based on the marks secured in the written test. Only the selected candidates will be intimated through e-mail.
how_to_apply: This is a walk-in written test. Eligible candidates should directly report to the venue on the date and time slot applicable to their discipline, as per the schedule given in the Important Dates table above. No online application or registration process is mentioned in the official notification.
Walk-In Venue: Centre for Learning & Development (CLD) Bharat Electronics Limited Jalahalli Post, Bengaluru – 560013
important_instructions: Duration of the Apprenticeship Training is One Year. No TA/DA will be provided to candidates for attending the written test. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be as per statutory norms. For any clarification, contact HR/CLD on Ph. No. 080-22195323 or email [email protected].

rows.details: Not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released.

content_sections.heading: BEL GAPP 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Last date to apply / register: Not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released, as this is a direct walk-in written test.

rows.discipline_group: Mechanical, Industrial Engineering & Management, Industrial Production, Mechatronics, Chemical Engineering
Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering / Bachelor of Architecture
Computer Science & Engineering, Information Science, Information Technology
Electronics & Communication, Electronics & Telecommunication, Electronics & Instrumentation, Electronics & Computer Engineering

content_sections.heading: BEL GAPP 2026 Vacancy Details (Discipline-Wise)
content_sections.text: Number of seats/vacancies per discipline is not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released. (Note: SL No. 6 is not listed in the source notification; the numbering jumps directly from 5 to 7.)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidate's domicile must be from the Southern Region only: Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala & Puducherry. Candidates who have undergone or are undergoing Apprenticeship Training under NATS in any other establishment/organization are strictly not eligible. Candidates who have acquired or are pursuing higher qualifications are not eligible.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Candidates should possess Engineering/Technology Graduation from a recognized Board/University on or after 01-07-2022, in one of the 14 disciplines listed above. Minimum percentage required in graduation:

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Monthly Stipend: ₹17,500/- (Rupees Seventeen Thousand & Five Hundred only), during the training period. Of this, ₹13,000/- will be paid by BEL and ₹4,500/- will be paid by the Government through Direct Beneficiary Transfer (DBT). Additional facilities provided: Canteen and Transport facilities available on chargeable basis. Free OPD Medical facilities at BEL hospital as per Company norms. Free Group Personnel Accident Insurance (GPAI) policy insured for a sum of ₹5.00 Lakhs.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is purely on the basis of merit based on the marks secured in the written test. Only the selected candidates will be intimated through e-mail.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: The following original documents must be provided during selection: SSLC Marks Card / 10th Marks Card Degree Certificate / Provisional Degree Certificate (PDC) Aadhar Card SC/ST/OBC/Divyang Certificates (if applicable) Documents required to be carried for the written test itself are not available in the official notification yet. This section will be updated once released.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: This is a walk-in written test. Eligible candidates should directly report to the venue on the date and time slot applicable to their discipline, as per the schedule given in the Important Dates table above. No online application or registration process is mentioned in the official notification. Walk-In Venue: Centre for Learning & Development (CLD) Bharat Electronics Limited Jalahalli Post, Bengaluru – 560013

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Duration of the Apprenticeship Training is One Year. No TA/DA will be provided to candidates for attending the written test. Reservation for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be as per statutory norms. For any clarification, contact HR/CLD on Ph. No. 080-22195323 or email [email protected] .

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Candidates who have completed their engineering graduation can also explore more Engineering Graduate Government Jobs and PSU Apprenticeship Jobs. Those based in Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala or Puducherry can check more Southern Region Government Jobs and Bengaluru Government Jobs for similar opportunities.

faq.question: Q1. What is BEL GAPP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a walk-in written test conducted by Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Bengaluru, for selecting Engineering Graduates for one-year Apprenticeship Training under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS).

faq.question: Q2. When is the BEL GAPP written test?
faq.answer: The written test is scheduled on 6th, 7th and 8th August 2026, with timings varying by discipline, as listed in the Important Dates table.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible for BEL Graduate Apprenticeship Training?
faq.answer: Candidates with an Engineering/Technology Graduation on or after 01-07-2022, domiciled in Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, Kerala or Puducherry, and within the specified age and percentage criteria, are eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for BEL apprentices?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend is ₹17,500/-, comprising ₹13,000/- from BEL and ₹4,500/- from the Government via DBT.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for BEL GAPP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in test; candidates need to report directly to the CLD venue in Bengaluru at the date and time slot given for their discipline. No online application process is mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for BEL GAPP selection?
faq.answer: SSLC/10th Marks Card, Degree Certificate/Provisional Degree Certificate, Aadhar Card, and SC/ST/OBC/Divyang Certificates (if applicable) are required at the time of selection.
